<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/uuid library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Uuid\Provider; use Ramsey\Uuid\Type\Time; /** * A time provider retrieves the current time */ interface TimeProviderInterface { /** * Returns a time object */ public function getTime(): Time; }
